# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys
input = sys.stdin.read

def main():
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    H = list(map(int, data[1:]))

    result = [0] * N
    A = [0] * (N + 1)
    time = 0

    for i in range(1, N + 1):
        # Simulate the process until A[i] > 0
        while A[i] <= 0:
            time += 1
            A[0] += 1
            for j in range(1, N + 1):
                if A[j - 1] > A[j] and A[j - 1] > H[j - 1]:
                    A[j - 1] -= 1
                    A[j] += 1
        result[i - 1] = time

    print(' '.join(map(str, result)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
